$comment: Placement output + the region plan that produced it. GENERAL: the zone-map shape, the {x,y,rot,layer} per-designator schema, the refdes-silk schema, the audit gotchas. SPECIFIC: zone boxes, anchors, coordinates. Frame: +X right, +Y up, origin bottom-left. AUDIT real geometry from COMPONENT rotation (pad rotation attrs go stale); component (x,y) is the footprint ORIGIN, not the pad centroid.

zones.$comment: region plan: partition quiet-logic / sensors-centre / noisy-power. edge = which board edge this zone opens to (connectors open OUTWARD).

anchors.$comment: edge-critical parts get a fixed (x,y,rot) so their opening faces the board edge. rot orients the physical connector mouth OUTWARD.

decap_adjacency.$comment: each IC → its decaps, placed by spiral-hug ≤3mm from the IC pin. highest physical-adjacency weight.

final.$comment: the placed result: one entry per designator. This is data the executor writes to the board and the auditor reads back to verify.

refdes_silk.$comment: measured (not estimated) bbox via getPrimitivesBBox; alignMode=5 (center); fs 40 for ICs, 32 for passives. Assert 0 label-label overlap, 0 label-under-part, 0 over-M2-ring, 0 out-of-board.

audit.$comment: PASS = 0 same-layer pad-gap violations on REAL geometry + practical review (edge parts open outward, sensors share axis) + client sign-off.
